title: De tal palo tal astilla
writer: Miguel M. Delgado, José María Fernández Unsáin, Eulalio González
actors: Luis Aguilar, Eulalio González, Flor Silvestre
plot: Miguel (the new sheriff) and Gumaro (the supposed villain who secretly protects the town) meet when Miguel is hired to bring Gumaro to justice. Instead of arresting him, they become friends. They rid the town of the villains and e...
